calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade's motion to compel responses to post-judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections to plaintiff's special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Continued To Oct-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
